---
name: New example request
about: Request a new use case or a missing language / framework for an existing one
labels: new example
---

## What use case should be added

Link to the relevant docs page if one exists, or describe what the example should demonstrate.

## Missing language or framework (if adding to an existing use case)

Which use case folder, and which language or framework is missing.

## Why it would be useful

Who would use this and what problem does it solve.
